metadata.name: wizard-startup
metadata.title: 🧙‍♂️ Welcome, Supreme Wizard - Master of All Realms

story.introduction: 🌟 All hail the Supreme Wizard! You have achieved mastery over all aspects of uDOS. With great power comes great responsibility - let's configure your omnipotent workspace.
story.context: Wizards have complete system access, development capabilities, and the power to modify core systems and spawn new users.
story.purpose: Configure master-level access and supreme administrative powers

variables.name: MASTERY-FOCUS
variables.prompt: Where will you direct your supreme powers?
variables.help: This configures your primary dashboard and available supreme tools

variables.name: DEV-MODE-PREFERENCE
variables.prompt: How do you want to manage development mode access?
variables.help: Controls when you have write access to core system folders

variables.name: REALM-MANAGEMENT
variables.prompt: How actively do you want to manage the entire realm?
variables.help: This configures system monitoring and automatic intervention levels

variables.name: LEGACY-CREATION
variables.prompt: What legacy do you wish to create for future users?
variables.help: This guides suggestion systems and project recommendations
